__fixture__.name: entitlement_grace_expired_narrows_to_local_safe
__fixture__.scenario: Entitlement grace has expired. The snapshot refreshes state is stale_past_grace; every feature tagged managed_only_requires_fresh_refresh is marked unavailable_pending_entitlement_refresh. Desktop-core features remain local-safe; no new managed privilege appears. The seed invariant that blocks new managed capability from stale snapshots is exercised end-to-end.
contract_sections: Entitlement-snapshot row anatomy / Plan and feature axes
Entitlement-snapshot row anatomy / Grace, expiry, and offline tolerance
What the seed guarantees / New managed privilege cannot appear from stale snapshots

feature_rows.feature_note: Editing stays invariant. Grace expiry does not touch desktop-core capability.
Local Git commit, branch, and search stay available.
Managed publish is pending a fresh refresh; the desktop will not grant it from the stale snapshot.
Managed AI quota cannot be exposed from a stale snapshot; BYOK AI remains available.
Fleet admin console is gated on a fresh refresh and an authenticated admin session.

seat_binding.seat_note: Seat state cannot be confirmed from the stale snapshot; the client refuses to grant new managed privilege until a fresh refresh confirms it.

quota_rows.overage_posture_note: Counters are not exposed from this stale snapshot; a fresh refresh is required before any managed AI request consumes quota.

grace_state.grace_posture_note: Grace expired 2026-04-21; managed-only features that require a fresh refresh are pending refresh.

expiry_state.expiry_note: Snapshot effective window ended 2026-04-21; the client falls back to local-safe defaults and blocks new managed privilege.

last_refresh.refresh_note: Last successful refresh 2026-04-10; retry attempts continuing every 20 minutes. Managed-only-requires-fresh-refresh features are blocked until a refresh succeeds.

policy_bundle_links.link_note: Snapshot inherits narrowing rules from the acme_dev tenant policy bundle.

locally_inspectable_fields: Grace reason and expired grace window.
Per-feature availability, with every managed_only_requires_fresh_refresh feature marked unavailable_pending_entitlement_refresh.
Quota rows in unknown_refresh_required with no counts exposed.
explainability_envelope.explainability_note: Every narrowing is explained from the snapshot; no vendor console is required to justify the block on new managed privilege.
